text: UAE Payment Token Services Regulation transitional period ends, full compliance now required
CBUAE Banking Law expands regulatory perimeter to include virtual asset payment services
UAE firms have until September 2026 to regularize position under new Banking Law
DFSA updates crypto token framework with revised stablecoin treatment effective January 2026
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority reconstituted as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
CBUAE Payment Token regulation opens door for stablecoin cross-border payment solutions
UAE PTSR framework supports open finance and sandbox regulatory developments
CBUAE licenses now required for open finance services and virtual asset payments
UAE digital payment token businesses must hold full license or registration immediately
DFSA implements specific regulatory treatment for fiat-referenced crypto tokens in UAE DIFC
